{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Virtual Senior Accountant",
  "description": "Trackline Shipping is a fast-growing global logistics and freight solutions company committed to moving businesses forward through reliable shipping, operational excellence, and smart financial management.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Virtual Senior Accountant

Job Location: Remote
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	As we continue expanding across international markets, we are looking for an experienced and detail-oriented Senior Accountant to join our remote finance team.
	If you thrive in a fast-paced environment, love solving financial puzzles, and want to work with a dynamic global team &mdash; we want to hear from you.


What You&rsquo;ll Do


	Manage monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reporting
	Prepare and analyze financial statements and reconciliations
	Oversee accounts payable, receivable, and general ledger activities
	Ensure compliance with accounting standards, tax regulations, and internal controls
	Support budgeting, forecasting, and financial planning processes
	Conduct variance analysis and provide strategic financial insights
	Collaborate with operations and leadership teams to improve financial efficiency
	Assist with audits and maintain accurate financial documentation
	Monitor cash flow and optimize financial performance across shipping operations.


What We&rsquo;re Looking For


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related fields
	2+ years of accounting experience, preferably in logistics, shipping, or supply chain industries
	CPA, ACCA, or equivalent certification a bonus
	Experience with accounting software such as QuickBooks, NetSuite, SAP, or Xero
	Advanced Excel and financial analysis skills
	Exceptional attention to detail and organizational abilities
	Strong communication skills and ability to work independently in a remote environment.


Why Join Trackline Shipping?


	Competitive salary (N550,000 - N700,000 monthly) package
	Fully remote work flexibility
	Opportunity to work with a global and collaborative team
	Career growth and leadership opportunities
	Supportive company culture that values innovation and excellence
	Paid time off and performance-based incentives.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-05-15",
  "validThrough": "2026-06-16",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

  },

      "addressCountry": "NG"

  },

Virtual Senior Accountant Job at Trackline Shipping




        
    

        
        Trackline Shipping is a fast-growing global logistics and freight solutions company committed to moving businesses forward through reliable shipping, operational excellence, and smart financial management.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Virtual Senior Accountant

Job Location: Remote
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	As we continue expanding across international markets, we are looking for an experienced and detail-oriented Senior Accountant to join our remote finance team.
	If you thrive in a fast-paced environment, love solving financial puzzles, and want to work with a dynamic global team — we want to hear from you.


What You’ll Do


	Manage monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reporting
	Prepare and analyze financial statements and reconciliations
	Oversee accounts payable, receivable, and general ledger activities
	Ensure compliance with accounting standards, tax regulations, and internal controls
	Support budgeting, forecasting, and financial planning processes
	Conduct variance analysis and provide strategic financial insights
	Collaborate with operations and leadership teams to improve financial efficiency
	Assist with audits and maintain accurate financial documentation
	Monitor cash flow and optimize financial performance across shipping operations.


What We’re Looking For


	Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related fields
	2+ years of accounting experience, preferably in logistics, shipping, or supply chain industries
	CPA, ACCA, or equivalent certification a bonus
	Experience with accounting software such as QuickBooks, NetSuite, SAP, or Xero
	Advanced Excel and financial analysis skills
	Exceptional attention to detail and organizational abilities
	Strong communication skills and ability to work independently in a remote environment.


Why Join Trackline Shipping?


	Competitive salary (N550,000 - N700,000 monthly) package
	Fully remote work flexibility
	Opportunity to work with a global and collaborative team
	Career growth and leadership opportunities
	Supportive company culture that values innovation and excellence
	Paid time off and performance-based incentives.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "IT Support & E-commerce Operations Officer",
  "description": "Buckler Systems is a Nigerian defense solutions provider with strong expertise in manufacturing civilian armored vehicles, design, and prototyping of military vehicles and ordnance equipment.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: IT Support &amp; E-commerce Operations Officer
Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Purpose


	The IT Support &amp; E-commerce Operations Officer will work closely with the Line Manager to ensure the efficient operation of Buckler Systems&#39; IT infrastructure and e-commerce activities.
	This role is pivotal in optimizing our online presence while maintaining the performance of our digital platforms, contributing directly to the achievement of the company&rsquo;s goals.


Key Responsibilities
IT Support:


	Manage and implement website upgrades, troubleshoot performance issues, and develop strategies to boost web traffic and user engagement.
	Install and configure computer hardware, operating systems, and software applications, providing hands-on technical support to staff as needed.
	Diagnose and resolve hardware, software, and network issues to ensure minimal disruptions to business operations.
	Set up new user accounts and handle password-related queries to facilitate smooth onboarding for new employees.
	Coordinate system security measures and respond swiftly to any security breaches or vulnerabilities.


Graphics Design:


	Design and create visual content such as event flyers, recruitment materials, and promotional posters for various company initiatives.
	Develop illustrations, logos, and graphic elements that align with Buckler Systems&#39; brand identity and communication standards.
	Ensure all graphic content is visually appealing and maintains consistency with the company&rsquo;s branding guidelines.


E-commerce Operations:


	Monitor website traffic, customer interactions, and feedback to assess and improve the user experience on our e-commerce platforms.
	Analyze sales data and customer reviews to forecast sales trends and adjust inventory and marketing strategies accordingly.
	Collaborate with product management, sales, and content teams to keep the e-commerce platform updated with accurate and engaging content.
	Implement SEO best practices to optimize product listings, pricing, and promotions to enhance the platform&rsquo;s visibility and performance.
	Lead efforts to drive sales growth and increase market reach through targeted e-commerce strategies and promotional campaigns.
	Provide regular updates to the management team, including performance reports and analysis of digital marketing activities.


Additional Responsibilities:


	Ensure that IT systems and networks are maintained and updated regularly to enhance efficiency.
	Innovate and introduce new technologies to streamline operations and improve overall work processes.
	Support other tasks and projects as required by the team or management.


Experience &amp; Qualifications


	B.Sc Degree / HND qualification in Computer Science or a related field.
	Minimum of 2 years of experience in related field.
	Strong digital marketing skills with experience in creating and executing marketing campaigns.
	Proficiency in content creation, graphic design, and social media tools.
	Solid communication skills and the ability to convey technical concepts in a clear and concise manner.
	Experience with SEO techniques and familiarity with e-commerce best practices.


Core Capabilities:


	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
	Excellent time management and the ability to meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.
	Creativity in design and content development.
	Ability to work collaboratively with cross-functional teams.
	Flexibility and adaptability in handling diverse tasks and challenges.


Method of Application&nbsp;

Interested and qualified candidates should send their resume to: hr@bucklersystems.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",
  "datePosted": "2026-05-15",
  "validThrough": "2026-06-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Buckler Systems"
    
  },

IT Support & E-commerce Operations Officer Job at Buckler Systems




        
    

        
        Buckler Systems is a Nigerian defense solutions provider with strong expertise in manufacturing civilian armored vehicles, design, and prototyping of military vehicles and ordnance equipment.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: IT Support & E-commerce Operations Officer
Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Purpose
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The IT Support & E-commerce Operations Officer will work closely with the Line Manager to ensure the efficient operation of Buckler Systems' IT infrastructure and e-commerce activities.
	This role is pivotal in optimizing our online presence while maintaining the performance of our digital platforms, contributing directly to the achievement of the company’s goals.


Key Responsibilities
IT Support:


	Manage and implement website upgrades, troubleshoot performance issues, and develop strategies to boost web traffic and user engagement.
	Install and configure computer hardware, operating systems, and software applications, providing hands-on technical support to staff as needed.
	Diagnose and resolve hardware, software, and network issues to ensure minimal disruptions to business operations.
	Set up new user accounts and handle password-related queries to facilitate smooth onboarding for new employees.
	Coordinate system security measures and respond swiftly to any security breaches or vulnerabilities.


Graphics Design:


	Design and create visual content such as event flyers, recruitment materials, and promotional posters for various company initiatives.
	Develop illustrations, logos, and graphic elements that align with Buckler Systems' brand identity and communication standards.
	Ensure all graphic content is visually appealing and maintains consistency with the company’s branding guidelines.


E-commerce Operations:


	Monitor website traffic, customer interactions, and feedback to assess and improve the user experience on our e-commerce platforms.
	Analyze sales data and customer reviews to forecast sales trends and adjust inventory and marketing strategies accordingly.
	Collaborate with product management, sales, and content teams to keep the e-commerce platform updated with accurate and engaging content.
	Implement SEO best practices to optimize product listings, pricing, and promotions to enhance the platform’s visibility and performance.
	Lead efforts to drive sales growth and increase market reach through targeted e-commerce strategies and promotional campaigns.
	Provide regular updates to the management team, including performance reports and analysis of digital marketing activities.


Additional Responsibilities:


	Ensure that IT systems and networks are maintained and updated regularly to enhance efficiency.
	Innovate and introduce new technologies to streamline operations and improve overall work processes.
	Support other tasks and projects as required by the team or management.


Experience & Qualifications


	B.Sc Degree / HND qualification in Computer Science or a related field.
	Minimum of 2 years of experience in related field.
	Strong digital marketing skills with experience in creating and executing marketing campaigns.
	Proficiency in content creation, graphic design, and social media tools.
	Solid communication skills and the ability to convey technical concepts in a clear and concise manner.
	Experience with SEO techniques and familiarity with e-commerce best practices.


Core Capabilities:


	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
	Excellent time management and the ability to meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.
	Creativity in design and content development.
	Ability to work collaboratively with cross-functional teams.
	Flexibility and adaptability in handling diverse tasks and challenges.


Method of Application 

Interested and qualified candidates should send their resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "At Genesis Group, we`&#39;`ve been living our dreams and redefining the world of hospitality for over three decades. Our journey has been characterized by excellence in a wide range of services, including Catering, Hotels, Restaurants, and Cinemas. With a team of over 10,000 dedicated professionals and 30 locations spanning across Nigeria and beyond, we take pride in delivering exceptional experiences to our valued customers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Officer (Hotel)
Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a professional and friendly Front Desk Officer to be the first point of contact for our guests, visitors, and callers.
	The candidate will manage the reception area, provide excellent customer service, and assist with basic administrative tasks.


Key Responsibilities


	Greet and attend to guests and visitors in a polite and professional manner.
	Answer phone calls, respond to inquiries, and direct callers to the right person or department.
	Register visitors, issue visitor tags, and maintain the visitor log.
	Receive, sort, and distribute mail, packages, and deliveries.
	Assist with basic administrative tasks such as filing, data entry, and appointment scheduling.
	Handle simple payments or documentation (if applicable, e.g., registration, booking, or sign?in).
	Keep the front desk neat, tidy, and well organized at all times.


Requirements


	Minimum of [e.g., 1&ndash;2] years experience in a front?desk, reception, or customer?service role is an advantage (fresh graduates may apply if confident and presentable).
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to multitask and work calmly in a busy environment.
	Honest, neat, and professional in appearance and attitude.
	Basic computer skills (typing, using email, simple office software).


Method of Application

Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: vacancies@genesisgroupng.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Front Desk Officer (Hotel) Job at Genesis Group




        
    

        
        At Genesis Group, we`'`ve been living our dreams and redefining the world of hospitality for over three decades. Our journey has been characterized by excellence in a wide range of services, including Catering, Hotels, Restaurants, and Cinemas. With a team of over 10,000 dedicated professionals and 30 locations spanning across Nigeria and beyond, we take pride in delivering exceptional experiences to our valued customers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Officer (Hotel)
Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a professional and friendly Front Desk Officer to be the first point of contact for our guests, visitors, and callers.
	The candidate will manage the reception area, provide excellent customer service, and assist with basic administrative tasks.


Key Responsibilities


	Greet and attend to guests and visitors in a polite and professional manner.
	Answer phone calls, respond to inquiries, and direct callers to the right person or department.
	Register visitors, issue visitor tags, and maintain the visitor log.
	Receive, sort, and distribute mail, packages, and deliveries.
	Assist with basic administrative tasks such as filing, data entry, and appointment scheduling.
	Handle simple payments or documentation (if applicable, e.g., registration, booking, or sign?in).
	Keep the front desk neat, tidy, and well organized at all times.


Requirements


	Minimum of [e.g., 1–2] years experience in a front?desk, reception, or customer?service role is an advantage (fresh graduates may apply if confident and presentable).
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to multitask and work calmly in a busy environment.
	Honest, neat, and professional in appearance and attitude.
	Basic computer skills (typing, using email, simple office software).

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Sales / Marketing Coordinator",
  "description": "Kloverharris Limited is a Human resource/IT Consulting company that provides high quality services to businesses across Africa. We pride ourselves in how well we assist organizations overcome challenges that bother on optimal performance by proffering a wide array of solutions through the use of deep IT expertise, industry- wide expertise and highly proficient tools.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales / Marketing Coordinator

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a results-driven and commercially minded Sales/Marketing Coordinator to drive revenue growth, strengthen client relationships, and oversee sales operations within the hospitality business.
	The ideal candidate will combine strong business development capability with effective team leadership and outlet management to improve profitability, customer experience, and operational performance.


Key Responsibilities
Business Development &amp; Sales:


	Identify and secure new business opportunities, corporate partnerships, and high-value clients.
	Drive sales across hospitality services including rooms, events, food, and beverage outlets.
	Develop and implement sales strategies to achieve revenue and growth targets.
	Monitor market trends, competitor activities, and customer preferences to improve market positioning.


Team Leadership &amp; People Management:


	Lead, supervise, and motivate sales and outlet teams to achieve performance goals.
	Conduct staff scheduling, performance monitoring, coaching, and training.
	Foster a customer-focused and high-performance work culture.
	Ensure effective communication and collaboration across departments.


Outlet &amp; Operational Management:


	Oversee daily outlet operations to ensure service excellence and operational efficiency.
	Monitor inventory usage, sales performance, and cost control measures.
	Ensure compliance with operational standards, hygiene, and customer service procedures.
	Resolve customer complaints and maintain high guest satisfaction levels.


Reporting &amp; Performance Management:


	Prepare sales reports, forecasts, and operational updates for management review.
	Track KPIs, revenue performance, and outlet profitability.
	Support management in implementing growth and improvement initiatives.


Qualifications &amp; Competencies


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Hospitality Management, or related field.
	Minimum of 2&ndash;3 years of experience in hospitality sales, restaurant management, or related roles.
	Hospitality experience
	Strong leadership, negotiation, and relationship management skills.
	Proven ability to drive revenue growth and manage teams effectively.
	Good understanding of hospitality operations and customer service standards.
	Proficient in Microsoft Office and POS/CRM systems.
	Results-oriented, proactive, and able to thrive in a fast-paced environment.


Method of Application

Interested and qualified candidate should send their detailed CV to: Recruitment@kloverharris.com using &quot;Sales / Marketing Coordinator&quot; as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-06-06",

    "@type": "Organization",

  },

    "@type": "Place",

Sales / Marketing Coordinator Job at Kloverharris Limited




        
    

        
        Kloverharris Limited is a Human resource/IT Consulting company that provides high quality services to businesses across Africa. We pride ourselves in how well we assist organizations overcome challenges that bother on optimal performance by proffering a wide array of solutions through the use of deep IT expertise, industry- wide expertise and highly proficient tools.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales / Marketing Coordinator

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a results-driven and commercially minded Sales/Marketing Coordinator to drive revenue growth, strengthen client relationships, and oversee sales operations within the hospitality business.
	The ideal candidate will combine strong business development capability with effective team leadership and outlet management to improve profitability, customer experience, and operational performance.


Key Responsibilities
Business Development & Sales:


	Identify and secure new business opportunities, corporate partnerships, and high-value clients.
	Drive sales across hospitality services including rooms, events, food, and beverage outlets.
	Develop and implement sales strategies to achieve revenue and growth targets.
	Monitor market trends, competitor activities, and customer preferences to improve market positioning.


Team Leadership & People Management:


	Lead, supervise, and motivate sales and outlet teams to achieve performance goals.
	Conduct staff scheduling, performance monitoring, coaching, and training.
	Foster a customer-focused and high-performance work culture.
	Ensure effective communication and collaboration across departments.


Outlet & Operational Management:


	Oversee daily outlet operations to ensure service excellence and operational efficiency.
	Monitor inventory usage, sales performance, and cost control measures.
	Ensure compliance with operational standards, hygiene, and customer service procedures.
	Resolve customer complaints and maintain high guest satisfaction levels.


Reporting & Performance Management:


	Prepare sales reports, forecasts, and operational updates for management review.
	Track KPIs, revenue performance, and outlet profitability.
	Support management in implementing growth and improvement initiatives.


Qualifications & Competencies


	Bachelor’s Degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Hospitality Management, or related field.
	Minimum of 2–3 years of experience in hospitality sales, restaurant management, or related roles.
	Hospitality experience
	Strong leadership, negotiation, and relationship management skills.
	Proven ability to drive revenue growth and manage teams effectively.
	Good understanding of hospitality operations and customer service standards.
	Proficient in Microsoft Office and POS/CRM systems.
	Results-oriented, proactive, and able to thrive in a fast-paced environment.


Method of Application

Interested and qualified candidate should send their detailed CV to: [email protected] using "Sales / Marketing Coordinator" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "title": "Ticketing & Reservation Officer",
  "description": "Elizabeth Maddeux Limited- Our client, a premier client dedicated to providing world-class travel and logistics solutions, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Ticketing &amp; Reservation Officer

Job Location: Lagos Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Ticketing and Reservation Officer will be responsible for overseeing the full lifecycle of travel bookings, from itinerary design to final ticketing, while ensuring compliance with international travel regulations.
	This role requires technical expertise in Global Distribution Systems (GDS), a sharp eye for detail, and the ability to navigate complex travel requirements in a fast-paced environment.
	The successful candidate will play a vital role in enhancing the client&rsquo;s service delivery, maximizing cost-efficiencies, and maintaining the high level of professional excellence that defines the organization&rsquo;s market standing.


Key Responsibilities
Reservations &amp; Ticketing:


	Strategic Fare Management: Utilize Global Distribution Systems (GDS) to research, quote, and issue tickets, ensuring all fares are optimized for both cost-efficiency and traveler convenience.
	Complex Itinerary Planning: Design and coordinate intricate flight routings and multi-city reservations tailored to specific passenger requests or corporate travel policies.


Client Advisory &amp; Communication:


	Proactive Information Delivery: Serve as a primary consultant by providing real-time updates on travel times, transit requirements, and essential international travel protocols.
	Real-Time Availability Management: Manage high-volume inquiries regarding flight schedules and pricing, providing accurate data on seat availability and seasonal fluctuations.


Customer Support &amp; Retention:


	Modification &amp; Conflict Resolution: Facilitate seamless ticket changes, reissuances, and cancellations while navigating airline policies to minimize penalties for the client.
	Value-Added Service Promotion: Identify opportunities to upsell special offers or ancillary travel products that enhance the passenger experience while meeting sales targets.


Technical Proficiency &amp; Accuracy:


	System Integrity: Maintain expert-level use of computer reservation systems to verify space availability and ensure data entry accuracy for all bookings.
	Space Optimization: Monitor &quot;on-request&quot; bookings and waitlists to secure confirmed space for customers on high-demand travel dates.


Sales &amp; Business Growth:


	Product Advocacy: Educate new and existing clients on the organization&rsquo;s service portfolio, ensuring they are aware of competitive advantages and new loyalty offerings.
	Lead Conversion: Systematically follow up on all inbound travel inquiries, applying persuasive communication techniques to convert prospects into confirmed sales.


Industry Awareness &amp; Excellence:


	Market Intelligence: Stay updated on global airline industry changes, policy shifts, and fare regulation updates that impact the ticketing and reservations landscape.
	Cross-Selling Performance: Actively promote and sell integrated travel products, such as insurance or lounge access, to maximize the revenue generated per transaction.


Qualifications &amp; Experience


	Minimum of an OND qualification.
	Proficiency in the use of any two of the 3 GDS is a must, especially Amadeus &amp; Galileo
	Experience in tour packaging is a plus
	Minimum of 4 years ticketing experience
	Strong Analytical skills
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	A positive attitude and a growth mindset.


Skills &amp; Competencies:


	Expert in Amadeus and Galileo
	Skilled in cost-effective itinerary planning.
	Proven ability to convert inquiries into sales.
	Quick resolution of flight changes or issues.
	Error-free data entry and ticket issuance.
	Professional and persuasive communication style.
	Fast delivery under tight airline deadlines.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their resume and cover letter to: recruit@elizabethmaddeux.com using &ldquo;Ticketing &amp; Reservation Officer&rdquo; as the subject of the email.

Note: Only qualified candidates will be contacted.",

Ticketing & Reservation Officer Job at Elizabeth Maddeux Limited




        
    

        
        Elizabeth Maddeux Limited- Our client, a premier client dedicated to providing world-class travel and logistics solutions, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Ticketing & Reservation Officer

Job Location: Lagos Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary

	The Ticketing and Reservation Officer will be responsible for overseeing the full lifecycle of travel bookings, from itinerary design to final ticketing, while ensuring compliance with international travel regulations.
	This role requires technical expertise in Global Distribution Systems (GDS), a sharp eye for detail, and the ability to navigate complex travel requirements in a fast-paced environment.
	The successful candidate will play a vital role in enhancing the client’s service delivery, maximizing cost-efficiencies, and maintaining the high level of professional excellence that defines the organization’s market standing.


Key Responsibilities
Reservations & Ticketing:


	Strategic Fare Management: Utilize Global Distribution Systems (GDS) to research, quote, and issue tickets, ensuring all fares are optimized for both cost-efficiency and traveler convenience.
	Complex Itinerary Planning: Design and coordinate intricate flight routings and multi-city reservations tailored to specific passenger requests or corporate travel policies.


Client Advisory & Communication:


	Proactive Information Delivery: Serve as a primary consultant by providing real-time updates on travel times, transit requirements, and essential international travel protocols.
	Real-Time Availability Management: Manage high-volume inquiries regarding flight schedules and pricing, providing accurate data on seat availability and seasonal fluctuations.


Customer Support & Retention:


	Modification & Conflict Resolution: Facilitate seamless ticket changes, reissuances, and cancellations while navigating airline policies to minimize penalties for the client.
	Value-Added Service Promotion: Identify opportunities to upsell special offers or ancillary travel products that enhance the passenger experience while meeting sales targets.


Technical Proficiency & Accuracy:


	System Integrity: Maintain expert-level use of computer reservation systems to verify space availability and ensure data entry accuracy for all bookings.
	Space Optimization: Monitor "on-request" bookings and waitlists to secure confirmed space for customers on high-demand travel dates.


Sales & Business Growth:


	Product Advocacy: Educate new and existing clients on the organization’s service portfolio, ensuring they are aware of competitive advantages and new loyalty offerings.
	Lead Conversion: Systematically follow up on all inbound travel inquiries, applying persuasive communication techniques to convert prospects into confirmed sales.


Industry Awareness & Excellence:


	Market Intelligence: Stay updated on global airline industry changes, policy shifts, and fare regulation updates that impact the ticketing and reservations landscape.
	Cross-Selling Performance: Actively promote and sell integrated travel products, such as insurance or lounge access, to maximize the revenue generated per transaction.


Qualifications & Experience


	Minimum of an OND qualification.
	Proficiency in the use of any two of the 3 GDS is a must, especially Amadeus & Galileo
	Experience in tour packaging is a plus
	Minimum of 4 years ticketing experience
	Strong Analytical skills
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	A positive attitude and a growth mindset.


Skills & Competencies:


	Expert in Amadeus and Galileo
	Skilled in cost-effective itinerary planning.
	Proven ability to convert inquiries into sales.
	Quick resolution of flight changes or issues.
	Error-free data entry and ticket issuance.
	Professional and persuasive communication style.
	Fast delivery under tight airline deadlines.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their resume and cover letter to: [email protected] using “Ticketing & Reservation Officer” as the subject of the email.

Note: Only qualified candidates will be contacted.
